appName.description: Name of the application. Used as a prefix for all resources.

domain.description: Domain name for HTTPS ingress routes (required if ingress.https is defined).

namespace.description: Namespace where the Gateway resource is deployed. Derived automatically by base-chart from apps.envoy-gateway.argocd.namespace — do not set it by hand.

loadBalancerIP.description: LoadBalancer IP pinned via the Gateway's spec.addresses (MetalLB assigns this to the Envoy proxy Service). Also used as the expected answer by the optional global.lanDnsCheck probe. Set per-environment.

namespace.description: Namespace the ArgoCD application-controller watches. All Application objects (parent apps and child apps) must live here.

refreshInterval.description: Interval at which to refresh secrets from the external store (default: 1h)

clusterSecretStoreRef.description: Reference to the cluster secret store

path.description: Base path in Akeyless where secrets are stored

oidc.description: OIDC provider configuration for Envoy SecurityPolicy.oidc (required when any route sets oauth: true)

issuerUrl.description: OIDC issuer URL (e.g. AWS Cognito user pool URL)

clientId.description: OIDC client ID registered with the issuer

cookieDomain.description: Cookie domain for OIDC session cookies (e.g. .example.com to share across subdomains)

security.description: Gateway-level authorization sources. Cloudflare-proxied traffic is gated by mTLS at a separate listener using cloudflareOriginCA; the LAN listener is reached directly by LAN clients.

cloudflareOriginCA.description: PEM-encoded CA certificate used to validate Cloudflare's client cert on the mTLS listener (port 4443). Public information — fine to commit. Generate with openssl, upload the leaf cert + key to Cloudflare's zone-level Authenticated Origin Pulls.

lanDnsCheck.description: Optional: monitor that internal DNS resolves a hostname under global.domain to global.gateway.loadBalancerIP. When set, prometheus-blackbox-exporter gets a dns_lan_gateway module, a Probe queries dnsServer, and a LanInternalDnsBroken alert fires when the answer is not the gateway IP. Leave unset to disable. Catches silent LAN→Cloudflare hairpinning.

dnsServer.description: IP of the internal DNS server to query (e.g. an AdGuard / Pi-hole instance on the LAN).

queryName.description: Hostname under global.domain expected to resolve to the gateway LB IP via internal DNS (e.g. argocd.<domain>).

hostNetwork.description: Use the host's network namespace. When true, the pod shares the node's network stack directly.

dnsPolicy.description: DNS policy for the pod. Set to ClusterFirstWithHostNet when using hostNetwork: true.

resources.description: Resource requests and limits for the container

containerPort.description: Port number to expose on the container

pvcMounts.description: Persistent volume claims to mount in the container

mountPath.description: Path where the volume should be mounted in the container

hostPath.description: Path on the host that will be used as the persistent volume

restore.description: Enable restore for this mount (defaults to false)

excludeLargerThan.description: Exclude files larger than this size (e.g., '100M', '1G')

excludeCaches.description: Exclude cache directories marked with CACHEDIR.TAG

deviceMounts.description: Device mounts from the host into the container

mountPath.description: Path where the device should be mounted in the container

hostPath.description: Path on the host to the device

configMapMounts.description: ConfigMaps to mount in the container

mountPath.description: Path where the ConfigMap should be mounted in the container

configMapName.description: Name of the ConfigMap to mount

secretMounts.description: Secrets to mount in the container as files

mountPath.description: Path where the Secret should be mounted in the container

secretName.description: Name of the Secret to mount

imagePullSecrets.description: List of image pull secret names for pulling private container images

envFrom.description: References to ConfigMaps or Secrets for environment variables

configMapRef.description: Name of the ConfigMap to load environment variables from

secretRef.description: Name of the Secret to load environment variables from

ports.description: Ports to expose through the service

port.description: Port number to expose on the service

targetPort.description: Target port in the container (defaults to the port value if not specified)

protocol.description: Protocol for the port (defaults to TCP if not specified)

https.description: HTTPS ingress routes via Gateway API HTTPRoute (requires global.domain to be set)

port.description: Port on the service to route traffic to

subdomain.description: Subdomain for the route (will be combined with global.domain). If not specified, the bare domain will be used.

pathPrefixes.description: List of path prefixes to match (OR'd together). Replaces matchSuffix.

rawMatch.description: Raw Gateway API HTTPRouteMatch objects for complex matching (headers, etc.)

service.description: Name of the service to route to (defaults to {appName}-service if not specified)

oauth.description: When true: route inherits the Gateway-level SecurityPolicy (OIDC + IP allowlist). When false/absent: a route-level SP overrides the Gateway-level one with IP allowlist only — no OIDC enforced.

tcp.description: TCP ingress routes via Gateway API TCPRoute

port.description: Port on the service to route traffic to

listener.description: Gateway listener name for the route

udp.description: UDP ingress routes via Gateway API UDPRoute

port.description: Port on the service to route traffic to

listener.description: Gateway listener name for the route

persistentVolume.description: Persistent volumes without claims (use persistentVolumeClaims instead for volumes with claims)

additionalProperties.description: Path on the host for the persistent volume

hostPath.description: Path on the host for the persistent volume

backup.description: Backup configuration for this persistent volume

enabled.description: Enable backup for this persistent volume

restore.description: Enable restore for this persistent volume (defaults to false)

excludeLargerThan.description: Exclude files larger than this size (e.g., '100M', '1G')

excludeCaches.description: Exclude cache directories marked with CACHEDIR.TAG

configMaps.description: ConfigMap definitions. Each key is the ConfigMap name, value is an object of key-value data.

additionalProperties.description: Value for this ConfigMap data entry

externalSecrets.description: External Secrets configuration for integrating with external secret management systems

additionalProperties.description: List of secret key-value pairs for an external secret

items.description: Secret key-value pair mapping local key to remote path

additionalProperties.description: Remote path for the secret value (will be prefixed with global.akeyless.path)
